channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump’s Trickle-Down Tariff Problem
item.description: The supposed benefits of high tariffs are far more distant and less visible to voters than those of tax cuts.

item.title: Orbán’s Exit Is Good News for Ukraine
item.description: Hungary’s election provides an opening for renewed aid to Kyiv — and a chance for the Trump administration to remember who America’s friends are, and ...

item.title: Damaging Activism Returns to Cornell
item.description: A recent on-campus incident at Cornell hearkens back to the college’s infamous 1969 protests.

item.title: The Rich Already Pay More Than Their ‘Fair Share’
item.description: They fund the bulk of federal revenues and pay higher tax rates than anyone else.
